directives.name: MfTooltipDirective

components.name: App
components.templateData:
UI Library

Welcome to {{ title() }}

This page explains how to install and start using ng-comps in any Angular project.

1) Install package

npm i ng-comps

2) Load base styles and design tokens

Add these imports in your global styles file (for example src/styles.css):

@import 'ng-comps/theme/tokens.css';
@import 'ng-comps/styles.css';

3) Use components in standalone Angular pages

Import only what you need for better tree-shaking.

import { Component } from '@angular/core';
import { MfButtonComponent, MfInputComponent } from 'ng-comps';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-example',
  imports: [MfButtonComponent, MfInputComponent],
  template: `
    <mf-input label="Email" placeholder="you@company.com" />
    <mf-button label="Save" variant="filled" />
  `,
})
export class ExampleComponent {}

4) Notes for production projects

  • The package is published with sideEffects: false for max tree-shaking.
  • Angular and RxJS are peer dependencies to avoid duplicated framework installs.
  • Import components directly from ng-comps; avoid wildcard barrel files in your app.

components.template:
<mat-card [class]="hostClasses()">
  @if (hasHeader()) {
    <mat-card-header>
      @if (title()) {

      }
      @if (subtitle()) {
        <mat-card-subtitle class="mf-card__subtitle">{{ subtitle() }}</mat-card-subtitle>
      }
    </mat-card-header>
  }
  <mat-card-content>
    <ng-content />
  </mat-card-content>
  <ng-content select="[mfCardFooter]" />
</mat-card>

components.description:
Panel lateral de la librería ng-comps. Envuelve Angular Material mat-sidenav-container y expone una API uniforme con look and feel de marca.

Dos formas de uso:

  1. Navitems declarativos — Proporciona navItems, headerTitle e icono.
  2. Content projection — Proyecta [mfSidenavContent] para control total.

El contenido principal se proyecta sin atributo.
components.rawdescription:
Panel lateral de la librería ng-comps.
Envuelve Angular Material `mat-sidenav-container` y expone una API uniforme
con look and feel de marca.

Dos formas de uso:
1. **Navitems declarativos** — Proporciona `navItems`, `headerTitle` e icono.
2. **Content projection** — Proyecta `[mfSidenavContent]` para control total.

El contenido principal se proyecta sin atributo.

<mat-tab-group
  [selectedIndex]="selectedIndex()"
  [class]="hostClasses()"
  [mat-stretch-tabs]="variant() === 'stretched'"
  (selectedIndexChange)="mfSelectedIndexChange.emit($event)"
>
  @for (tab of tabs(); track tab.label) {
    <mat-tab [disabled]="tab.disabled ?? false">
      <ng-template mat-tab-label>
        @if (tab.icon) {
          <mat-icon class="mf-tabs__icon" aria-hidden="true">{{ tab.icon }}</mat-icon>
        }
        {{ tab.label }}
      </ng-template>
    </mat-tab>
  }
</mat-tab-group>
components.description: Tabs de la librería ng-comps. Envuelve Angular Material mat-tab-group y expone una API uniforme con look and feel de marca.

      this.hintId(),
      this.errorId(),
      this.counterId(),
